---
title: "Figure 5 (info distortion contour, other algorithms) — NR / MNR / R / MR information-distortion maps"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
The Information-distortion diagonal contour (filled), as for macro_IR, but for the REMAINING
algorithms NR, MNR, R, MR. Their distortion spans many decades (R up to ~12, MR ~500, NR ~1600,
NMR ~13000) and some cells are ~0 (null directions), so the IR scale (0.667..1.5 around 1) saturates.
Fix: plot log10(distortion) on a diverging scale SYMMETRIC in log around 0 (= no distortion, white),
SHARED across the four algorithms so they are comparable. The two reserved outer bands catch both
extremes: distortion > 10^4 (darkest red) and distortion -> 0 / degenerate (darkest blue, floored).
Plane x = interval, y = N_ch; facet parameter x noise. ONE Rmd -> one PDF per algorithm.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGOS    <- c("macro_NR", "macro_NMR", "macro_R", "macro_MR", "macro_IR")
ALGO_LAB <- c(macro_NR = "NR", macro_NMR = "MNR", macro_R = "R", macro_MR = "MR", macro_IR = "IR")

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

# ONE shared scale for all algorithms, with DOUBLE the colours (23 bands) so the fine near-1
# structure (IR) and the huge naive range both fit. Breaks in log10(distortion): SYMMETRIC around 0
# (white band (-0.03, 0.03] contains 0 = no distortion), fine near 0, growing ~x1.6 out to +/-4.
# The palette EXTENDS RdBu into darker-than-RdBu blue/red at the extremes, so the naive blow-ups get
# progressively darker while IR stays light. Same scale = directly comparable across algorithms.
POS         <- c(0.03, 0.06, 0.1, 0.16, 0.25, 0.4, 0.65, 1.0, 1.6, 2.5, 4.0)
FILL_BREAKS <- c(-Inf, -rev(POS), POS, Inf)                # 23 bands, white centred on 0
PAL <- colorRampPalette(c("#021024", "#053061", "#2166AC", "#4393C3", "#92C5DE", "#D1E5F0",
                          "#F7F7F7",
                          "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B", "#67001F", "#3d0011")
                        )(length(FILL_BREAKS) - 1)
FLOOR <- 1e-5   # distortion 0 (null direction) -> floored into the darkest reserved blue band
```

```{r read-fn}
# kind = "battery_sim" (distortion over the simulations) or "battery_pool" (at the pooled fit theta_pool)
read_algo <- function(algo, kind) {
  files <- unlist(lapply(NOISES, function(z) Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_%s.csv", NSIM, algo, z, kind)))))
  noises <- sub(".*_noise_([0-9.]+)_.*", "\\1", basename(files))
  map2_dfr(files, noises, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = .y))
}
SOURCES <- c(battery_sim = "sim", battery_pool = "pool")   # generate both

info_diag <- function(df) df %>%
  filter(component_path == "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Information_Distortion",
         statistic == "value", probit == "mean", param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)]) %>%
  group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name) %>%
  summarise(D = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(logD = log10(pmax(D, FLOOR)),
         lx = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
         param  = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
```

```{r plot-fn}
X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));           X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")

build_one <- function(algo, kind, suffix) {
  dd  <- info_diag(read_algo(algo, kind))
  lab <- ALGO_LAB[[algo]]
  g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = logD)) +
    geom_contour_filled(breaks = FILL_BREAKS) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = PAL, drop = FALSE, name = expression(log[10]~"distortion")) +
    geom_point(size = .3, colour = "grey30") +
    facet_grid(param ~ noisef, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
    labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch]),
         title = sprintf("%s  Information distortion (diagonal), log10 scale  [%s]", lab, suffix)) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
          legend.text = element_text(size = 6), legend.key.size = unit(.32, "cm"),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
  ggsave(sprintf("Figure_5_info_distortion_contour_filled_%s_%s.pdf", lab, suffix), g,
         width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
  g
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
for (a in ALGOS) for (k in names(SOURCES)) print(build_one(a, k, SOURCES[[k]]))
```
